path: Problem: Count unique values within a dynamically resetting group/segment of rows (restart count when a control field changes) and return the segment’s unique count at the segment end
Action: IF to only output at group boundary + find last reset/start row via LARGE(IF()) over change-detection + build segment range with INDEX + count distinct via SUM(1/COUNTIFS(range,range))

Observation: A new segment starts whenever the control column value differs from the previous row; the segment start can be derived as the most recent row where this change occurred, then used to define the current segment range for distinct counting
